questions.question: What shipping calculation method should be used for domestic orders? And for overseas shipping, which regions/carriers should be supported?
questions.why: Client wants overseas shipping support. Need to define: domestic calculation method (flat rate, weight-based, RajaOngkir), and scope for international shipping (regions, carriers, customs handling).

questions.question: Which analytics platform should be integrated (Google Analytics 4, Hotjar, Mixpanel, etc.)?
questions.why: Analytics deferred for now but will be needed for tracking conversions and user behavior. Early decision helps plan the integration structure.
